items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the event cursor pointer for restarting from a known good state. However, the prior steps do not provide any evidence related to the event cursor pointer or its functionality. As a result, it is not possible to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap in the implementation.
